title: National Hospital Staffing Crisis
description: Hospitals report severe staffing shortages, delaying critical care.

B.title: Increase pay and bonuses for healthcare workers

C.title: Relax licensing requirements to hire more staff

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Deploying military medics stabilizes hospitals immediately.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: But it’s expensive and temporary. Incentives attract long-term staff.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Relaxing licensing respects freedom and expands the workforce quickly.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: We need both safety and sustainability.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: And we need to trust people to step up when the system is strained.
